description.value: Doctronic offers an AI-powered medical assistant platform that uses a chatbot to provide medical answers and personalized health management.

description.value: Health Universe develops a platform for orchestrating AI agents in healthcare organizations.

data_source.value: medical records from NIN, TEF, and CEA through Kno2

models_used.value: ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini, or custom, fine-tuned models

description.value: Latent offers AI software that processes EHR data to assist with medication management and to automate medication approval workflows.

description.value: Freenome has developed blood test for colorectal cancer detection based on artificial intelligence. Freenome's technology combines computational biology, machine learning and various data types to detect the most subtle signs of cancer, even in the earliest stages. In addition to colon cancer, the company is developing a test for lung cancer detection.

methodology.value: computational biology, machine learning and various data types
